sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Eastside Waterfowl Series Ponds. Season: August 16 through September 30. Daily: 5 trout and 15 warmwater game fish of which not more than 2 may be black bass. Minimum size for black bass is 14 inches total length. Possession: 10 trout and 30 warmwater game fish of which not more than 4 may be black bass. Hours: Any hour of the day or night.

sources.title: Hinkson Slough — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: The Mason Valley Wildlife Management Area was purchased by the state in 1955 to develop wetlands for waterfowl... With the completion of the Mason Valley Hatchery in 1990, a constant supply of water was ensured and led to the expansion of the Fish Series ponds.

sources.title: Mason Valley WMA Season Opener — Nevada Fish Reports
sources.quotedText: Season is open Aug. 16 through Sept. 30; any hour of the day or night.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: ...anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Lyon County — Mason Valley WMA: Eastside Waterfowl Series Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Eastside Waterfowl Series Ponds are open to fishing August 16 through September 30 only (all other times of year closed, as part of the Mason Valley WMA closed-waters default).

parameters.counting_rule: Daily limit is 5 trout plus 15 warmwater game fish, of which not more than 2 may be black bass. Possession limit is 10 trout plus 30 warmwater game fish, of which not more than 4 may be black bass. Trout and warmwater game fish are separate sub-limits, not interchangeable.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Lyon County — Mason Valley WMA: Eastside Waterfowl Series Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit is 5 trout and 15 warmwater game fish (no more than 2 black bass); possession limit is 10 trout and 30 warmwater game fish (no more than 4 black bass).
regulations.verbatimText: Daily: 5 trout and 15 warmwater game fish of which not more than 2 may be black bass. Possession: 10 trout and 30 warmwater game fish of which not more than 4 may be black bass.

parameters.note: Applies only to black bass counted within the warmwater game fish daily/possession sub-limit.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Lyon County — Mason Valley WMA: Eastside Waterfowl Series Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Black bass kept must be at least 14 inches total length.
regulations.verbatimText: Minimum size for black bass is 14 inches total length.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Lyon County — Mason Valley WMA: Eastside Waterfowl Series Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Fishing is allowed any hour of the day or night during the open season.
regulations.verbatimText: Any hour of the day or night.

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: ...anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
